# PCVerse
> Local-first PC diagnostic lab for Windows and Linux — health scan, test history, optional AI advisor. No cloud account required.

## Summary
PCVerse replaces juggling HWiNFO, GPU-Z, and manual spreadsheets with one local web laboratory. Install via GitHub Releases.

## Install
- Windows: PCVerse-Setup-Windows-x64.exe
- Linux: PCVerse-Setup-Linux-x64.run
- Latest: https://github.com/drmikecrypto/pc-lab-kit/releases/latest

## Documentation
- README.md — overview and quick start
- docs/FAQ.md — common questions
- docs/GITHUB_PUBLISH_AND_RELEASE.md — maintainer release guide
- LICENSE — Elastic License 2.0
- TRADEMARK.md — brand policy

## Keywords
PC diagnostic, hardware monitoring, HWiNFO alternative, GPU health, CPU thermal, local-first, Windows, Linux, benchmark, telemetry, RGB

## Author
https://github.com/drmikecrypto
